allow:
Bash(gh pr create --title "Allow multiple source selection for fetch and search" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Summary

- **Data Management**: Replaced single-select radio buttons with checkboxes so users can fetch articles from multiple sources \(PubMed, Europe PMC, ClinicalTrials.gov, OpenAlex\) in one operation, fetching each sequentially
- **Data Management**: Database is now cleared before each fetch, so results only contain articles from the current search rather than accumulating across fetches
- **Search**: Added source filter checkboxes to the Search page so users can filter results to one or more sources after searching

## Test plan

- [ ] In Data Management, check multiple sources and fetch — confirm articles from each selected source are fetched and previous articles are cleared
- [ ] In Data Management, check zero sources and click Fetch — confirm validation error appears
- [ ] In Search, uncheck some sources and search — confirm results only show articles from checked sources
- [ ] In Search, uncheck all sources and search — confirm validation error appears

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)
EOF
\)")
